title: Notepad tab: large text field, persist notes to disk
description: Notepad main tab with large textarea; crystalcontext_notepad.txt in project root (Local) or user profile .claude (Global); debounced save; Copy/Clear; errors shown in-panel.
success_criteria: A dedicated Notepad tab is visible in the webview
User can switch between Prompt and Notepad without reloading the window
Notepad uses a large multi-line textarea
Notes save to crystalcontext_notepad.txt per Local/Global scope
npm test runs webview-console-smoke (no console.error from webview script)
Prompt builder YAML flow still works on Prompt tab
notes: extension_eval npm test executes webview-regression + webview-console-smoke.
